ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was last updated */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package maintainer */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information of the package */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has the dependency */,
  "dependency_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Depends, Imports) */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependent package */,
  "dependency_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency type */,
  "import_methods" TEXT /* Methods imported from the dependency */,
  "import_classes" TEXT /* Classes imported from the dependency */,
  "required_packages" INTEGER /* Number of required packages */,
  "heaviness_from_parent" INTEGER /* Heaviness from the parent package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependency_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "imported_from" TEXT /* Package or namespace the method is imported from */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* Method signature (parameters and return type) */,
  "method_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the method is used in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "imported_from" TEXT /* Package or namespace the class is imported from */,
  "class_inheritance" TEXT /* Parent class of the current class */,
  "class_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the class is used in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "changelog_url" TEXT /* URL of the changelog for the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency version */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the dependency version */,
  "changelog_url" TEXT /* URL of the changelog for the dependency version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the dependency version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_versions_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, package maintainer, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package or dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package or dependency was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the package or dependency was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or tool used to access the package or dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "heaviness_score" INTEGER /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heaviness score */,
  "heaviness_score_description" TEXT /* Description of the heaviness score */,
  "heaviness_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the heaviness analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version where the change occurred */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_author" TEXT /* Author of the change */,
  "change_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_changes_change_author FOREIGN KEY ("change_author") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES package_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_changes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
